chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D — 110 of 2022. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE[s] 13.04.2022. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 5300/2022. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 4156/2022. Mr. Raja Hans Raj Naurang Advocate for petitioner. ---- Urgency granted. At the request of the counsel the application for the restoration is taken up and is allowed. However, learned counsel insists that this petition on the strength of the facts and circumstances be considered. We have perused the petition and it appears that petitioner seeks Foti Khata Badal in the inherited property in the revenue record. We are afraid such questions that concern with the revenue entries on the basis of inherited claim cannot be entertained in the petition under Article 199. The petitioner may pursue his remedy before a forum having jurisdiction under the law which may include revenue forum or civil court. The petition being misconceived is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE A.
